title: NASA Black Holes
description: A NASA source card about black holes, gravity, evidence, and extreme objects in space.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA black hole resources explain how gravity can become so strong that light cannot escape, and how scientists infer black holes from nearby stars, gas, and radiation.
Use this source for evidence-based astronomy reading: students can separate what scientists observe from what models predict.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
